mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM heritage_project p
AND p.status = 1
AND p.category_id = #{query.categoryId}
AND p.area LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.area}, '%')
AND p.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')

SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, p.area, p.project_intro AS projectIntro, p.status, p.create_time AS createTime FROM heritage_project p LEFT JOIN heritage_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.status = 1

SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, IFNULL(SUM(d.view_num), 0) AS totalView, IFNULL(SUM(d.exposure_num), 0) AS totalExposure, COUNT(DISTINCT d.channel_id) AS channelCount FROM heritage_project p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT d.* FROM spread_data d INNER JOIN spread_channel c ON d.channel_id = c.channel_id WHERE c.status = 1 ) d ON p.project_id = d.project_id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.status = 1 GROUP BY p.project_id, p.project_name

SELECT 'project' AS type, p.project_id AS id, p.project_name AS name, p.area AS area, NULL AS projectName, LEFT(p.project_intro, 80) AS description FROM heritage_project p WHERE p.status = 1 AND ( p.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.area LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.project_intro LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY p.project_id ASC
